ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Apr-06-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT JEFF SUE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Jeff Sue's "demurrer to plaintiff's complaint" is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41. That law requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" at which "the objections to be raised in the demurrer" are addressed. Counsel's declaration does not indicate that such a meet and confer occurred. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by February 8, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2021 Continued To Mar-01-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
